programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony explores a few of the many faces of Miami. Chef Michelle Bernstein takes Tony out to an authentic Cuban breakfast and a late-night dinner at a gas station café in Doral.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Libyan hip-hop, Italian restaurants, tribal allegiances and post-war uncertainty in Libya. Bourdain looks at the country through personal stories, food, and the music of anti-Qaddafi rapper expats.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Welcome to Putin’s Russia. If you don’t fall into line, you could be the target of a show trial and be thrown into a penal colony. But if you’re hungry you might actually find something worth eating.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Israel, the West Bank and Gaza are three locations Tony has never travelled to before.The intense and fraught relationship between these places is hard to understand but Tony will attempt to delve into the lives of those who live here, through their food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: New Mexico has the largest Hispanic population per capita in the US. No better way to see the mash-up of cultures that make up this uniquely American State, than by what the people here are eating

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The first time Tony visited Beirut, it didn't end well. Now Tony is back in Beirut, where all the world’s troubles and all the world's good comes together to form a city like no other.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Once Johannesburg was the most dangerous city in the world, but the end of the apartheid has lead to vast changes in the city. Tony visits the Johannesburg suburb of Hillbrow, and discovers the culture and, of course food.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: With the slight relaxation of control by the government of Myanmar, Tony is finally able to explore one of the most fabled and beautiful areas of Asia.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Tony will explore several regions of Colombia from the mountains down to the Caribbean coast to the coca leaf growing inlands formerly controlled by drug cartels.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: In this episode of Anthony Bourdain: Parts Unknown, Tony travels to Madagascar, a place that outsiders understand surprisingly little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown, Tony returns to one of his favourite places on Earth, Vietnam.He journeys to a city he has never been to, Hu?, The City of Ghosts.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Detroit holds a unique place in American history. Few cities have seen such a dramatic rise and fall from economic boom to disparity. Tony explores the past, present and future of the Motor City.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Tony explores the other Hawaii, the one that those eight million tourists don’t see when they come to the islands. He discovers the fabric of a true cultural mixing pot.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Sicily isn’t about fast food or the fast life. It’s about savoring family, life, food and making the most of what you have. Tony will go in search of those foods and their producers and eat his way around the island.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tony explores what Burroughs called "Interzone," where artists sought escape from Western moral prohibitions and the possibilities of great empty spaces. But what is it like now?

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A country of only six million people where a vast percentage of the land is steaming hot jungle or a huge scrub desert known simply as The Chaco. This is one of the least known nations in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Tony dives into the ever-changing state of Punjab, India. Starting off his journey in Amritsar, Tony is immediately struck by the chaos around him.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown Tony travels back to his homeland, his roots, his favorite state in the union: New Jersey. Part nostalgia, part cautionary tale. Tony makes sure to hit up some NJ classics.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Tony visits Andalucia during Semana Santa – Holy Week – a time filled with great pageantry and excitement. Tony’s longtime DP, Zach Zamboni, currently lives in Granada with his fiancée, Fuen Sanchez.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Tony seeks to challenge his notions of Mississippi by taking a road trip to meet a cast of Mississippians enjoying the diverse foodways and embracing the traditional and contemporary music worlds.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Tony and his friend, world-renowned chef Eric Ripert, explore the far reaches of indigenous Andes in search of a rare variety of wild cocoa that is said to be the "best" in the world.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: In this episode, we leave behind Africa we’ve come to know in the news. Instead, we embrace the wild, untamed land of mystery, adventure, and exoticism; Zanzibar.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Roy Choi’s food reflects a new American idea of "natural" fusion. Bourdain examines the meeting point of Asian, Mexican, Latino culture in modern LA.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: In this episode of Parts Unknown, we first visit the city of Glasgow, then we head north into the Scottish Highlands.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tony travels to Shanghai. Forget the antiquated views you might hold about a communist-run, creativity-devoid State of androids. The modern China is a vibrant, dynamic monument to capitalism.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Tony accompanies world-renowned chef and restaurateur Daniel Boulud as they travel back to Daniel’s hometown of Lyon, France for a pilgrimage of the city’s rich food culture and its legendary chefs.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Tony travels to Mexico City and Oaxaca to meet who fight for the food, the art, and the lives they believe in. In the Santa Anita neighbourhood of Mexico City, Tony meets boxer Jorge Lacierva.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: This unique episode looks closely at the “other” Massachusetts far away from the blue blood getaways of Nantucket or the urban sprawl of Boston that most people know so little about.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: The Bronx is burning, became the defining image of New York City in the 70s. Politicians used it as a backdrop illustrate the dire situation in America’s cities while local officials let it burn

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Bourdain looks at the Congo as one of the more industrialized powers in Africa now largely crumbled to nothingness and chaos with Tim Butcher author of Blood River.

programme.title: Anthony Bourdain Parts Unknown S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The two funniest and most brilliant chef/restaurateurs in Canada, Joe Beef's Dave McMillan and Fred Morin, take Tony across Canada by rail.

programme.title: Thank God You're Here S4 Ep. 5

programme.title: Thank God You're Here S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Each week four special guests step through a door into a scene where everyone has a script - except them! Comic chaos featuring some of the funniest performers from Australia and overseas. Hosted by Shane Bourne and Judged by Tom Gleisner.

programme.title: Thank God You're Here S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Do you enjoy watching performers pushed into their discomfort zone? Thank God You're Here thrusts well known guest performers into a scenario they know nothing about, working with a cast who do know what's going on. Hosted by Shane Bourne.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Becker sees a psychologist and Linda looks for a new job.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: During an attempt to quit smoking, John attends a for-kids only pancake breakfast.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Jake gets married to a girl he just met. John buys a faux designer clock as a gift, which gets broken.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: John helps a homeless man he discovered is a con artist when he learns the man is ill.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: John takes Reggies advice to be more sensitive with women. It helps at the office with Margaret, but backfires with a woman he is dating.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 6
programme.desc: John panics when he has to get an MRI, finally resorting to Valium to get through the claustrophobic test.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Reggie goes out to dinner with her abusive friend Sara and Sara's husband, Richard. She finds that she and Richard are attracted to each other.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: John tries to keep a casual love affair alive, while Bob tries to turn a found Super Bowl ring into his ticket to fame and fortune.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Christmas Episode- John believes that Christmas is a phony time of the year. Instead of embracing the Christmas spirit, he uses getting robbed as vindication for his position.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 11
programme.desc: John is surprised when a patient is disappointed at the news that he's not terminally ill. Jake scams Bob in a Scrabble game.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Reggie meets Johns's friend Dan, who is recently divorced from an extraordinary, accomplished woman.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Becker and the crew decide to barter services office visits for food and services.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Becker bores a bartender with a story about his ex-wife's wedding.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Becker obsesses over whether or not younger women still find him attractive. Linda takes advantage of a hard-working temp.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Becker gets in hot water with parents when his nutrition lecture at an elementary school turns into a sex talk.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 17
programme.desc: An unflattering picture of someone other than John is placed in an article about him, causing him distress.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 18
programme.desc: John gets a portable talking computer for his speech-impaired patient, with unintended consequences.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Reggie decides to help Jake fulfill some of the dreams he had as a child, with disastrous consequences.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 20
programme.desc: Bob uses a questionable friend to get Reggie a great deal on a new freezer. John acts as a sex therapist for the Bennetts, an 80-year-old couple having difficulties because of Mr. Bennett's newly revived libido.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Dr. John Becker's laundry, apartment, and mail have all been tampered with and he is sure the culprit is one of his pesky neighbors.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 22
programme.desc: When John receives some expensive steaks from a patient, his new neighbor Chris cajoles him into throwing a party.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 23
programme.desc: John is surprisingly concerned when he learns that his new neighbor Chris has left town without saying goodbye.

programme.title: Becker S4 Ep. 24
programme.desc: Reggie and Chris compete for John's affection. Linda takes Margaret out for a night on the town.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: John enters the diner from Reggie's apartment, trying to sneak out.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Now that Reggie is gone, John tells Chris he has feelings for her (Chris).

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: John sits on his fire escape, smoking a cigar, the smoke from which is wafting into Chris's open window directly above.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: As John and Jake chat about Chris at the diner, Bob rushes in and announces that he just saw Chris naked when he went to fix her faucet.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Becker has a videotape of a French film that he plans to use to lure Chris into coming over to his place.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Becker tries to discourage a friend from expressing interest in Chris by telling him that she is gay.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: At the diner, Chris is in the kitchen when a robber enters.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Christmas Episode- At the diner, John expresses his repulsion for all the Christmas decorations.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 11
programme.desc: At the office, Margaret reveals to Linda that it's her ten-year anniversary of working for Dr. Becker.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 12
programme.desc: One of John's patients, a high school student named Brad, comes in for a physical and John learns that the guy's being sexually active, but isn't practicing safe sex. John performs an HIV test on Brad and tries to convince him to begin practicing safe sex.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Bob is distraught because a thirty-something guy at his gym died while on the treadmill, and he's certain that he's headed for the same fate.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Becker is upset when a patient substitutes his Christian Science faith for medical treatment.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 15
programme.desc: John helps his elderly neighbor, Mrs. Firth, get into her apartment and she repays him by making homemade chicken noodle soup.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 16
programme.desc: John's at the end of his rope with his hectic practice and makes a call, which Linda overhears, telling the person on the other end that he can't take another day.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 17
programme.desc: When a customer leaves the diner because of John's cigarette smoke, Chris puts her foot down and tells him that it is now a "smoke-free" restaurant.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 18
programme.desc: John arrives at the diner and announces that he has quit smoking.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 19
programme.desc: John walks into the diner and sees Chris, Bob, and Jake standing around a booth.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 20
programme.desc: The fire marshal threatens to fine Chris for a faulty sprinkler system at the diner, but Chris flirts her way out of it.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 21
programme.desc: Chris' ex-husband, Roger, is in town and comes to the diner to see her.

programme.title: Becker S5 Ep. 22
programme.desc: John has a dream that he and Chris kissed each other. At the office, Linda is late and tells Margaret it's because her cab got hit by a runaway hotdog cart.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Highlights from last season include Chris and John exchanging "I love yous" as Chris is wheeled into surgery for an appendectomy.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 2
programme.desc: At the diner, Jake bemoans his poor financial status, and Hector proposes that he participates in a drug-testing program to earn money.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Chris and John have their first impromptu date, but Chris wants something more formal before taking the relationship any further, and tells John so.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 4
programme.desc: John takes Chris out for their first official date - to a cheap Chinese restaurant. both are excited about the possibility of their "first time."

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 5
programme.desc: As John and Chris get more serious in their relationship, Chris realizes that John is not as affectionate as she'd like him to be.

programme.title: Becker S6 Ep. 6
programme.desc: At the diner, Hector tries to talk Jake into giving him money to invest in coffee futures, but Jake resists.

programme.title: Hunger For Cash
programme.desc: Nurse Maureen McDermott hires a co-worker to murder her roommate.

programme.title: Self Made Widows
programme.desc: Some women choose to profit from a permanent separation when they fall out of love with their spouses.

programme.title: Heartless
programme.desc: These women prove how callous they are when they commit unspeakably monstrous acts against other people.

programme.title: Lover's Revenge
programme.desc: A woman shoots her ex-husband to death in front of their children.

programme.title: For the Money Honey
programme.desc: For these women, one good man wasn't enough.

programme.title: Second Best
programme.desc: A call girl craves the high life, a teen mum eradicates her rival, and a lesbian affair rips a family apart.

programme.title: Cold As Ice
programme.desc: An Iowa divorcee stages a home invasion and alcohol and jealousy prove to be a lethal mix.

programme.title: Greed
programme.desc: Like as Black widows these women kill their spouses , lovers and children for profit

programme.title: Revenge
programme.desc: Crimes of revenge are usually single acts of passion. A brew of hatred and restitution boils over

programme.title: Poisonous Women
programme.desc: This one hour documentary tells the stories of four women who turned to poison.

programme.title: Obsession
programme.desc: Like a rogue computer virus obsessions corrupt the thought processes of an otherwise healthy brain.

programme.title: Episode 3
programme.desc: When a deranged mind of a deadly woman snaps , there's no telling when the killing will stop.

programme.title: Episode 2

programme.title: Episode 6
programme.desc: Women are more often prey than predators but the exceptions are deadly women.

programme.title: Episode 4
programme.desc: Dark secrets are the stock - in - trade of deadly women

programme.title: Episode 3
programme.desc: Greed is one of the oldest motives for murder, and these deadly women are no exception.

programme.title: Sleeping with the Enemy
programme.desc: A self centred former beauty queen decides to end her marriage and at the same time profit from it.

programme.title: Above Suspicion S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Travis joins Alan Daniels on a date and grows more convinced of his innocence, but is it just another performance? And could he still have more of his story to reveal?

programme.title: Above Suspicion S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: The hunt for killer Charles Wickenham leads to dark family secrets, a torture cellar, and a shocking twist, his body found trapped in hiding. Justice, in the end, comes from the shadows.

programme.title: Above Suspicion S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Petrozzo dies from a forced fentanyl OD. Travis links it to a 30M stash stolen in Miami. A diary entry Godot leads her to Julia's ex, who may be a dangerous fugitive using an alias.

programme.title: Above Suspicion S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Amanda's lovers are questioned, one lost a crucifix, another's wife saw a man at the flat. Her toy rabbit and drugs are missing. Another body turns up, and secrets keep piling up.

programme.title: Above Suspicion S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Langton learns Wickenham abused both daughters, Emily and Justine, and killed in Black Dahlia style. Evidence from Gail and photos expose him; he dies trapped, likely by the protective housekeeper.

programme.title: Above Suspicion S3 Ep. 3
programme.desc: David Rushton is found dead like Petrozzo fentanyl overdose, CCTV turned to the wall. A shaken Julia is questioned. A blurry CCTV image may reveal the killer, could it be Fitzpatrick?

programme.title: Above Suspicion S4 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Felicity Turner's body is found. Jeanie admits to holding Amanda's diary, linking Lester James as lover and pusher. CCTV reveals the killer. Langton learns of betrayal; Anna's promotion news arrives.

programme.title: Accused S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Special needs teacher Alison and her unemployed husband David are drifting apart. Though she initially rejects the advances of a charming work colleague, David does not believe her.

programme.title: Accused S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Young Frankie Nash joins the army to get off an assault charge and is sent to Afghanistan with best mate Peter, who only joined up to impress his war hero father and goes to pieces under fire.

programme.title: Accused S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Teenager Rob Ryland is killed in the warehouse where he works. Rob's parents Helen and Frank start to become suspicious when they learn that Rob's boss has been instructed by his lawyer to hold back the body.

programme.title: Accused S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: After his little girl is molested in a park, Kenny assaults the man answering the culprit's description. But when the man dies, Kenny's attempts to lie to the police about his whereabouts only arouse the further suspicions of dogged inspector Warren.

programme.title: Accused S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Taxi driver Liam's gambling habit prevents him from buying a reward present for his daughter when she passes her exams, so he burgles a fare's house but becomes obsessed with the house owner.

programme.title: Accused S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Mo Murray runs a hair salon with her friend Sue on an estate riven by gang violence. When Sue's son Sean is shot dead, Mo spearheads a local group informing on drug dealers in the area.

programme.title: Accused S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Peter Cartwright engages Charlotte, a nurse, to tend his dying wife Katherine. Several months after Katherine's death, he begins to date Charlotte, eventually marrying her.

programme.title: Accused S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Stephen Cartwright begins his sentence at an understaffed young offender unit. His wing officer, Tina Dakin, is concerned at his withdrawn attitude and attempts to prevent him from killing himself.

programme.title: Accused S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: After a row with a drunken bigot, crossdresser Simon gets into a taxi with Tony Baines. Tony is fascinated by Simon's alter ego Tracie and the two begin an affair.

programme.title: Accused S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Plumber Willy Houlihan is all set to leave his wife and three children for his girlfriend Michelle when his daughter Laura announces her forthcoming wedding.

programme.title: Raw S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Jojo and Bobby get a rude awakening when the Garda come looking for their flat mate Eddie, who is suspected of dealing drugs.

programme.title: Raw S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: A mysterious newcomer appears to re-open Raw and reunite the old team. But will her plans be thwarted at the last minute?

programme.title: Raw S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Fiona and Geoff use all of their savings to refurbish Raw — a high-risk strategy in Ireland's tough economic climate. Opening night is a success but a sudden robbery occurs.

programme.title: Raw S4 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Fiona is upbeat on her 40th birthday, until the gang receives news that the Raw building is to be sold.

programme.title: Raw S5 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Everyone is surprised when Jojo returns to Raw with a ring on her finger and a new husband in tow.

programme.title: Raw S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Jojo is looking forward to Eddie's homecoming party — and more specifically, to drinking enough to forget about Bobby flirting with Rebecca.

programme.title: Raw S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Shane and Jojo's domestic bliss is wrecked by an unexpected visit from their mother, Maeve. She in turn gets a nasty shock when Shane's arrest is revealed.

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 904
programme.desc: Best Friends Forever: Kenny is in a coma. Cartman wants life-support turned off so he can get his PSP. But Kenny's spirit is leading the armies of heaven against the demons of hell! (S9, E04)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 905
programme.desc: The Losing Edge: The boys are bored of playing baseball, and concoct a plan to lose the big play-off game. Randy trains hard to become the biggest drunken jackass at each match. (S9, E05)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 906
programme.desc: The Death of Eric Cartman: Everyone decides to ignore Cartman! He is convinced he is dead and must find peace by making amends for his past sins. Will Butters' 'psychic ability' help him? (S9, E06)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 907
programme.desc: Erection Day: Jimmy's noticed that one of his body parts has a mind of his own, so he tries to control his raging hormones in time to perform his comedy routine at the School Talent Show. (S9, E07)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 908
programme.desc: Two Days Before The Day After Tomorrow: Stan and Cartman crash a speed boat into the world's largest beaver dam, flooding the town of Beaverton. Everyone's response is that of mass hysteria! (S9, E08)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 909
programme.desc: Marjorine: Cartman is convinced that the girls have a device which can see into the future. The boys come up with a plan to take it. Unfortunately for Butters he's a major part of the plan. (S9, E09)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 910
programme.desc: Follow That Egg: In a bid to prevent Mr. Slave from marrying Big Gay Al, Mrs. Garrison forces the children to help him in an experiment to prove that gay marriages are unstable. (S9. E10)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 913
programme.desc: Free Willzyx: The boys are tricked into believing the killer whale at Sea Park is from the moon. How will Timmy's wheelchair, the Russian government and their skateboards help to free him? (S9, E13)

programme.title: South Park S9 Ep. 914
programme.desc: Bloody Mary: Randy is arrested for drunk driving and must attend AA, where he is told he is powerless to control himself. Maybe the bleeding Virgin Mary statue can perform a miracle or two? (S9, E14)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Kyle and his family are moving to San Francisco. The only way Stan can get his best friend back is to convince everyone to start driving hybrid cars.

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Towelie gets over his drug addiction and writes his memoirs. With Oprah's support, his book becomes a best seller and his story inspires millions to turn their lives around.

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1001
programme.desc: The Return of Chef: The boys notice that Chef is acting weird after returning from the 'The Super Adventure Club'. Why is he trying to seduce them? Can a trip to a strip joint help? (S10, E01)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1006
programme.desc: ManBearPig: Ex U.S. Vice President Al Gore visits South Park Elementary and warns the pupils about ManBearPig, a monster which is "half man, half bear and half pig" - you can't be "cereal"! (S10, E06)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1007
programme.desc: Tsst: Cartman's mum realizes she can no longer control him, so attempts to get help from various reality TV experts. Only when she recruits the "Dog Whisperer" do results start to happen. (S10, E07)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1008
programme.desc: Make Love, Not Warcraft: The boys are all shades of mad when a 'griefer' repeatedly kills them in an online game. Some serious training is in order so they can defeat him and play the game! (S10, E08)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1010
programme.desc: Miss Teacher Bangs A Boy: Power goes to Cartman's head when he becomes "Dawg the Hallway Monitor". Meanwhile, Kyle is shocked to discover his little brother Ike and his teacher are at "it"! (S10, E10)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1011
programme.desc: Hell On Earth 2006: Satan has a Sweet 16 style party in L.A. on Halloween! The gang perform a ritual and manage to summon Biggie Smalls - who demands Butters helps him get to the party! (S10, E11)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1013
programme.desc: Go God Go XII: Cartman is stuck in the future, caught up in a battle between atheists and sea otters! And what will become of Richard Dawkins and Mrs. Garrison's love affair? (S10, E13)

programme.title: South Park S10 Ep. 1014
programme.desc: Stanley's Cup: In a parody of underdog sports films, Stan is sentenced to community service and ends up coaching the Park County Pee-Wee hockey team - can he turn these losers into winners? (S10, E14)

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 1
programme.desc: After failing to show respect for their teacher, PC Principal revokes Pyjama Day privileges for the entire 4th grade class on the most important day of the year.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Stan is horrified to realise that he's misinterpreted some of the greatest writing of all time and dedicates himself to curing his unconscious bias by reading The Lord of the Rings.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Cartman is furious with his mom when she tells him about her new job.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 4
programme.desc: With world tensions escalating, a lot is riding on Butterâ€™s ability to crush the Russian competition in the all-important Under 10s Dressage Championship.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The boys find out that the joys of playing Airsoft come with the challenges of dealing with teenagers.

programme.title: South Park S25 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Butters is shocked to learn that people in South Park don't understand what St. Patrick's Day is really about.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Cartman Gets An Anal Probe: Cartman dreams he has a close encounter with an alien. The other boys are convinced the dream was real, and that he has been the victim of an alien anal probe. (S1, E01)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When Cartman's environmental essay wins a national contest, America's sweetheart, Kathie Lee Gifford, comes to South Park to present the award.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: A weekend trip to experience the finer points of camping, fishing and blowing animals to smithereens is threatened by an erupting volcano.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: An Elephant Makes Love To A Pig: Kyle calls in genetic engineer Dr. Mephisto to crossbreed his pet elephant and Cartman's pot-bellied pig in a bid to win a science competition. (S1, E05)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Death: Stan's ancient grandfather attempts to trick the boys into killing him. Meanwhile, the parents of South Park lobby a TV network to rid the airwaves of Terrance and Phillip. (S1, E06)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: A mishap at the morgue transforms the residents of South Park into brain-eating zombies and threatens the boys night of Trick-or-Treating.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Thanksgiving Episode- Mistaking Cartman for a starving African child, government authorities send him to Ethiopia where he runs into Sally Struthers.

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Mr Hankey, The Christmas Poo: The Mayor decides to impose a holiday theme which won't offend anybody. Kyle tries to convince everyone that Mr Hankey (a singing Christmas poo) exists. (S1, E09)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Damien: The new kid in class persuades Jesus to do battle with his father, Satan, in the final battle of good versus evil. Cartman is livid to learn the bout clashes with his birthday. (S1, E10)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Tom's Rhinoplasty: The boys become lesbians to impress a new teacher, making Wendy jealous. Also, to his delight, Mr. Garrison's plastic surgery leaves him looking like David Hasselhoff. (S1, E11)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Mecha-Streisand: Cartman and Kyle fall out over a magic triangle they un-earth on an archaeological dig. The triangle yields the power to turn Barbra Streisand into a terrible monster. (S1, E12)

programme.title: South Park S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Cartman's Mum Is A Dirty S**t (1): Dr. Mephisto helps Cartman un-cover the truth about his dad's identity. The spotlight is on quite a few of South Park's male residents. Who could it be? (S1, E13)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Cartman's Mum Is Still A Dirty S**t (2): Dr Mephisto is shot before he reveals who Cartman's father is. Who exactly shot him? Meanwhile, the rest of the town try to deal with a blizzard. (S2, E02)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When Barbrady resigns, anarchy ensues and the boys pitch in to help.

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Ike's Wee Wee: Kyle misunderstands what circumcision is and thinks he has to save Ike's penis from being cut off! Mr. Mackey is fired, and turns to drugs - "drugs are bad, m'kay?" (S2, E04)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Conjoined Fetus Lady: Kyle is terrified because he has to see the school nurse, who has a scary deformity. Meanwhile, the school dodgeball team goes to China - only Pip can save them now. (S2, E05)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: City On The Edge Of Forever: The school bus ends up perched on the edge of a ravine after it crashes in a snowstorm. Must be time for some flashbacks then! Can these memories be trusted? (S2, E07)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Summer Sucks: The boys' plans for 4th of July celebrations are ruined when the State bans fireworks. It's up to Uncle Jimbo and Ned to save the day with a little trip down Meheeco way. (S2, E08)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Chef's Chocolate Salty Balls: The Sundance Film Festival is in South Park but it's not long before Hollywood culture is over running the town and polluting the sewer where Mr Hankey lives. (S2, E09)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Chickenpox: The boys are sent to Kenny's for the night, so they can all get chickenpox. The boys decide to get even on their parents by hiring a prostitute with mouth herpes to infect them. (S2, E10)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Roger Ebert Should Lay Off The Fatty Foods: The boys are taken to the planetarium but Cartman has other ideas and decides to audition to sing the Cheesy Poofs song on their next advert. (S2, E11)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Clubhouses: Stan and Kyle build a clubhouse, so they can play truth or dare with Wendy and Bebe. Cartman and Kenny decide to build their own rival clubhouse based on The Ewoks Village. (S2, E12)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Cow Days: The boys try to win Terrance and Phillip dolls at the carnival but a dodgy carnie keeps changing the rules - time to call "shenanigans"! Cartman dates Leonardo DiCaprio. (S2, E13)

programme.title: South Park S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Chef Aid: Chef realises that Alanis Morissette's (fictional) hit song "Stinky Britches" is a song that he wrote years ago but the record company aren't interested in giving him any credit. (S2, E14)

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Commander Hoek and Cadet Stimpy's rocket hurtles out of control and leaves them marooned on an eerie uncharted planet, where they attempt to find food and avoid the hideous Brainiac men.

programme.title: Drawn Together S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Spanky teaches Clara to step outside of her comfort zone, while Xandir and Captain Hero bond.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: An obsessive-compulsive giant ape needs a job, and Callie struggles with her sudden attraction to Twayne.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 407
programme.desc: Daria joins Jake on a business trip where he tries to court a big-name client, and Helen tries to bond with Quinn at a sleepover.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 404
programme.desc: Daria dreams up a murder mystery at her school after Kevin and the football team are suspected of cheating on a test.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Ren & Stimpy journey to the Blue-Cheese Mountains to become miners. After dealing with some savages, they finally reach the blessed mountains where they mine the cheese and dream of being rich.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Mark helps Leonard with his magic wand issues, and Twayne Boneraper meets his two-dimensional soulmate.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: After winning a contest for Gritty Kitty Litter.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Callie goes baby-crazy when Mark fosters a demon orphan, and Twayne notices odd changes in his body.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 311
programme.desc: Daria and Jane wonder if aliens have taken over their town after Secret Service agents urge the students at Lawndale High to report anyone who exhibits strange behaviors.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Grimes' judgmental mother rises from the dead, and a neglected Randall reconsiders his living situation.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 510
programme.desc: Helen agrees to help her niece with her divorce, Jake leaves home to escape Helen and Aunt Rita's bickering, Daria avoids Tom, and Stacy and Tiffany face a fashion dilemma.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 509
programme.desc: Daria and Jane's friendship is tested when Jane dates an opinionated guy with a love for everything vintage, and Upchuck tries his hand at magic.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Stimpy's stupidity becomes too much for Ren and he leaves home to become a hermit. All alone, Ren begins to go crazy because he misses his true friend.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Ren and Stimpy find themselves in elf and gnome world where everyone happily works to graduate Pixie status. Stimpy loves his new work, but Ren thinks it's too hard and everyone is too happy.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Randall is infected by horrifying plants at sea when Twayne throws a cruise ship party.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The situation grows increasingly dire for everyone trapped in the van, and Foxxy is taken captive.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Becoming a breakfast cereal mascot leads Wooldoor to fame and Crunch Berries addiction.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 302
programme.desc: When Daria volunteers at a retirement home, she discovers that her tone makes her as unpopular with the senior citizens as it does with her peers.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 306
programme.desc: Jake gets Daria a job after she reveals the result of her career aptitude test, Trent and Jesse attempt to write a new song, and Jane tries to save Daria from humiliation.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Mark cares for an undocumented werewolf, and Leonard envies his famous magician brother, Christ Angel.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: When the Morgendorffers move to Lawndale, bubbly younger daughter Quinn becomes instantly popular while her sarcastic sister Daria is told to work on her self-esteem.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Jane and Trent head to a Lane family reunion, and Helen decides to take the Morgendorffer's on a family camping trip for rest and relaxation.

programme.title: Drawn Together S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The housemates rise up against the dreaded "Reality TV Twist."

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: Daria struggles with Jane's unexpected desire to be on the school track team.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When ditzy cheerleader Brittany invites Daria to a party with the popular kids, Quinn reveals that she'll also be attending the party.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: A New York Department of Integration social worker helps supernatural creatures adapt to city life.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: The roommates gather for a very special clip show reunion sit-down with The Producer.

programme.title: Daria S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Quinn feels so pressured to get plastic surgery after another Fashion Club member gets a nose job that she pulls Daria out of class to go to a consultation with her.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Ren and Stimpy are preparing for Yaksmas, the wonderful holiday where Stinky Weezelteats and his sidekick Yak visit and leave great gifts, such as hot link sausages and pre-chewed gum.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Manbird season hits New York City, and Mark finds himself the guardian of a fledgling separated from its flock.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Commander Hoek and Cadet Stimpy, on a 36 year mission in space, go crazy from boredom. Penniless and hungry, Ren and Stimpy seek work as mice catchers - with Ren as the bait.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Captain Hero attempts to pledge a new neighborhood Greek family, and Ling Ling's dad moves in.

programme.title: Drawn Together S3 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Captain Hero must become cool in order to save the world, and Toot and Ling-Ling take up cockfighting.

programme.title: Daria S4 Ep. 406
programme.desc: During Lawndale's homecoming parade, Daria and Tom find themselves reluctantly wrangling a precocious child together.

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Lawndale High holds a medieval fair to raise money for a new library roof, and Quinn tries out for the lead in a play.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: The surviving roommates return home to cast a new roommate.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Stimpy becomes overly superstitious. He continues to live by his superstitions and Ren keeps disbelieving. Ren and Stimpy travel to a new country and take the viewer along.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Captain Hero faces off against Super Nanny, and Ling-Ling grapples with his cultural identity.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 504
programme.desc: Daria and Quinn attend a camp reunion, Trent does some soul-searching, and Jake and Helen air their grievances while cleaning the garage.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Twayne and Callie build a summer camp to cover up their raid on a wizard training ground.

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Jane and Daria team up for an art contest depicting their idea of student life at the dawn of the millennium, but their negative approach doesn't sit well with everyone.

programme.title: Daria S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: The students of Lawndale High take a paint-balling field trip, and Daria and Quinn are in for a surprise when their parents sign up as chaperones.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Ren is suffering from allergies. Little does he know that he may be allergic to his best pal. Ren and Stimpy leave the country when it rains and their fields are ruined with fruits and vegetables.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 511
programme.desc: Daria has mixed feelings when she applies for a scholarship sponsored by a company known for unethical business practices, and Jane resents the scholarship process.

programme.title: Daria S5 Ep. 506
programme.desc: A teachers' strike at Lawndale High results in Daria instructing Quinn's English class, and teachers turn to Trent and Jane for artistic advice.

programme.title: Ugly Americans S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Councilman Fitzpatrick sells his soul to Twayne, and Callie considers a cushy job in Hell.

programme.title: Drawn Together S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Captain Hero and Wooldoor battle over Unusually Flexible Girl, and Foxxy has a run-in with Foxxy 5.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Ren and Stimpy pass through a black hole and mutate in their strange surroundings. Stimpy invents a happy helmet that pushes the naturally angry Ren past the happy limit into madness.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 309
programme.desc: Two wacky radio DJs broadcast their show outside of Lawndale High, and Daria's grandma Ruth moves into the Morgendorffer household after Jake suffers a medical emergency.

programme.title: The Ren & Stimpy Show S4 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Ren & Stimpy go to the Natural History Museum to see the skeletal remains of the mammoth Stimpysaurus. Wilbur Cobb tells them about the evolution of the great beast.

programme.title: Daria S3 Ep. 305
programme.desc: The editor of a teen magazine comes to Lawndale High to hang out with Daria, Jake struggles with the latest teen lingo, and Jane's clever idea begins to take root.

programme.title: Cold Comforts
programme.desc: The officers of 15 Division are reeling in the aftermath of the unexpected death of one of their colleagues.

programme.title: The Rules
programme.desc: Staff Sergeant Frank Best decides it_s time for his officers to get back on track.

programme.title: Every Man
programme.desc: Andy and Nick investigate a torched van. It belongs a street priest who's been receiving death threats.

programme.title: I Never
programme.desc: When a child abductor escapes from an emergency hospital visit, 15 Division goes on the hunt for the criminal.

programme.title: Surprises
programme.desc: After months working undercover, Andy and Nick’s operation goes sideways when Nick - then Andy - go missing.

programme.title: Homecoming
programme.desc: On her first day back at 15 Division, Andy must work with Swarek to track down an ex-convict.

programme.title: Different, Not Better
programme.desc: Andy is partnered with Swarek’s new girlfriend, Officer Marlo Cruz.

programme.title: The Kids Are Not Alright
programme.desc: A routine highway check leads to the discovery of a teenage boy in the trunk of a car.

programme.title: Poison Pill
programme.desc: After a messy drug arrest, Andy and Marlo are quarantined together.

programme.title: Skeletons
programme.desc: There's a possible connection between a missing woman and one of the division’s most distressing cases.

programme.title: Friday the 13th
programme.desc: When human bones found in a ravine open up a 15-year-old case, Swarek reunites with his old training officer.

programme.title: For Better, for Worse
programme.desc: Things get complicated when the team gets called to a hijacked casino bus full of senior citizens.

programme.title: What I Lost
programme.desc: When Chris returns for a visit, his reunion takes a shocking turn when his son, Christian, is abducted.

programme.title: You Are Here
programme.desc: Near the end of a shift, 15 Division busts a marijuana grow-op.

programme.title: Deception
programme.desc: When a pedophile is found beaten, Andy discovers Marlo has been conducting an off-hours “investigation."

programme.title: Under Fire
programme.desc: Someone with a grudge against 15 Division opens fire on Andy and Chloe.

programme.title: You Can See the Stars
programme.desc: The officers have to piece together the truth about a past crime in order to find Oliver Shaw.

programme.title: Blink
programme.desc: Andy and Dov pull themselves together at an all-night diner, but are caught off-guard in a diner hold-up.

programme.title: All By Her Selfie
programme.desc: Oliver gets promoted to Acting Staff Sergeant, and Andy is tasked with training 15 Division’s newest rookie.

programme.title: Heart Breakers, Money Makers
programme.desc: Inspector Jarvis sends the officers to seize all “proceeds of crime” – anything purchased with illegal money.

programme.title: Wanting
programme.desc: After the discovery of an executed gang leader, 15 Division must find the killer before a gang war breaks out.

programme.title: Going Under
programme.desc: When 15 Division goes undercover at a club-land bar, Chris’s erratic behavior make Dov suspicious.

programme.title: Two Truths and a Lie
programme.desc: As the officers try to hunt down the killer of Brian Gowdy – Andy and Sam go on the road for interviews.

programme.title: Deal with the Devil
programme.desc: Oliver prepares Andy to defend herself at Duncan’s dismissal hearing, now happening two hours from now.

programme.title: Exit Strategy
programme.desc: An innocuous call to a middle-class home puts Dov and Chris in the middle of a home invasion investigation.

programme.title: Moving Day
programme.desc: 15 Division works on a program to help tenants move out of a subsidized-housing complex that’s being torn down

programme.title: Fragments
programme.desc: Andy’s former rookie, Duncan, is back on duty and looking to reconcile – something she’s not ready for yet.

programme.title: Everlasting
programme.desc: The officers work to find a bomber. But after catching him, they realize he has more targets set to explode.

programme.title: Open Windows
programme.desc: Andy is attacked by an intruder at Traci’s place and the Sex Crimes Unit steps in to take over the case.

programme.title: The Real Deal
programme.desc: Tim seeks Amy and Georgie’s help to discourage Jade from accepting a shady sponsorship deal.

programme.title: Risky Business
programme.desc: Amy and Cass work together to save a racehorse with a career-ending condition.

programme.title: No Regrets
programme.desc: Georgie’s school project on Val Stanton inspires her to take a risk with Adam.

programme.title: Making a Move
programme.desc: When Lou returns from New York there's a new ranch hand and food truck that is threatening Maggie’s business.

programme.title: Pandora’s Box
programme.desc: Lou finds herself trapped at the Dude Ranch with Mitch, the new ranch hand.

programme.title: Love Is Just a Word
programme.desc: While helping Cass handle a spirited horse, Amy learns there is more riding on their success than she realized

programme.title: Resolutions
programme.desc: When their plans to get away are thwarted, Amy and Ty celebrate their first anniversary closer to home.

programme.title: There Will Be Changes
programme.desc: As Amy and Ty prepare for parenthood, they work together to resolve a dangerous pregnancy issue.

programme.title: You Just Know
programme.desc: Ty performs life-saving surgery on a mare, while the family works around-the-clock to bottle feed the foals.

programme.title: New Kid in Town
programme.desc: Tim is caught in the middle of Jade’s showdown with a new hotshot bronc rider.

programme.title: New Horizons
programme.desc: When Amy and Ty reach a difficult decision, the family grapples with the implications of their choice.

programme.title: Something to Prove
programme.desc: When one of Tim’s team-building events turns competitive, Georgie gets stuck partnering with Jade’s rival.

programme.title: The Green-Eyed Monster
programme.desc: When Amy helps an archer reconnect with her horse, she unravels the mystery behind Spartan’s recent behavior.

programme.title: Riding Shotgun
programme.desc: When Lou is given a horse, Amy helps her sister nurture a connection with the animal.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 24
programme.desc: Katy Perry guest judges a very special Hot N Cold challenge to honour the iconic MasterChef theme song. The contestant with the best dish will find themselves safe from Sunday's elimination.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 25
programme.desc: Contestants are cooking off against the other contestant on their bench. The best dish from each bench will be safe, while the remaining contestants must cook in the elimination round.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 26
programme.desc: Jo Barrett and Matt Stone from Oakridge Wines mentor today's service challenge with each team cooking a sweet or savoury menu. The team with the least impressive menu face tomorrow's pressure test.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 27
programme.desc: Contestants must replicate chef Peter Gunn's Black Box from his restaurant Ides. The contestant with the least impressive dish will be going home.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 28
programme.desc: Contestants must create a vegan dish using at least one ingredient from the mystery box set by vegan chef, Shannon Martinez. The top four dishes will cook off in tomorrow's immunity challenge.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 29
programme.desc: Tonight's immunity challenge is fought in two rounds. In one round contestants must create a delicious dish using instant noodles. The top two from round one must make a nostalgic and comforting dish.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 30
programme.desc: Josh Niland of The Fish Butchery breaks down a kingfish for each of the contestants to choose a cut to cook with. The contestant with the least impressive dish will be going home.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 31
programme.desc: Each team must cook two dishes - one main and one dessert. Each contestant has 20 minutes to cook and they have just 45 seconds to hand over the dish to the next contestant in the relay.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 32
programme.desc: Queen of chocolate and guest chef, Kirsten Tibballs reveals for today's pressure test, the contestants must create her wow-factor dessert, the meljito.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 33
programme.desc: The contestants lift the lids of their mystery box to find a photo sent by their loved ones. The contestants have 60 minutes to create a dish inspired by the memory in their family photo.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 34
programme.desc: Contestants must create a dish inspired by one of seven classic fairytales. With an open pantry and garden, the contestant with the best dish and the strongest concept will win immunity.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 35
programme.desc: Contestants must make a dish that has two different flavoured ice-creams that only work when they are eaten together. In round two, they must make a dish using one of five unusual flavour pairings.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 36
programme.desc: Contestants cook a sweet or savoury style dish championing a citrus fruit of their choice. In round two, they use the same fruit but their dish must be in the opposite style.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 37
programme.desc: Contestants discover they must create a dish inspired by chef Coskun Uysal's chicken rice pudding dessert. With this in mind, they must create their own dessert featuring a meat or protein.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 38
programme.desc: Today's mystery box ingredients are decided entirely by the luck of the draw, with numbered lottery balls corresponding to 25 ingredients on display.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 39
programme.desc: Each round in today's immunity challenge is worth 10 points and the contestant with the highest score at the end of round three will win immunity and be free from elimination on Sunday.

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 40
programme.desc: Who will make the MasterChef Australia top 10 in this Australia-themed pressure test?

programme.title: MasterChef Australia AU S12 Ep. 41
programme.desc: What's behind the wall?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 5
programme.desc: The aftermath of Tribal Council hits home as a strong alliance is left untethered. Can an uncovered mystery give rise to a new power? Or will it cause more friction than ever before?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Both tribes deal with the aftermath of Tribal Council and a hurricane of a different sort comes to Survivor beach. Strategies are questioned. Who will be going home tonight?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 7
programme.desc: With a pivotal vote out of the way, each tribe begins to turn on one another and a major milestone of the game gets in the way of their plans.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 8
programme.desc: After an epic blindside one tribe is divided, and another is out for revenge. And after a chaotic scramble, where no one believes anyone, anything can happen at Tribal Council.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 9
programme.desc: One castaway is left grovelling. Meanwhile, a mouth-watering reward is up for grabs, but can it be enough to strengthen tribe mate suspicions?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Is it worth taking a chance with a new alliance or should you trust someone again? Anything can happen at Tribal Councilâ€¦

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 11
programme.desc: The aftermath of last night's Tribal Council lingers and revenge is on the cards. An endurance challenge could see a rising star emerge and Tribal Council isn't quite as it seems.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 12
programme.desc: A second chance is up for grabs, and a Reward twist changes the power dynamics of the two dominant alliances. Who will be going home tonight?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 13
programme.desc: An alliance still reeling from an earlier vote leads to all-out war, but their plan to avenge their friend's blindside leads to outbursts and twists at Tribal Council.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Divided more than ever after the previous tribal, a feud continues to rampage through the tribe, tearing alliances apart. Who will be going home tonight?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Newly formed alliances are tested and an epic Reward is up for grabs that could change everything. Who will be going home tonight?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Eleven contestants remain and an opportunity to take back control of the game is on someone's mind. Where will the votes fall tonight and who will become the first jury member?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 17
programme.desc: As a powerful new alliance sends ripples through the camp, who will stay loyal to friends and alliances, and who will jump ship?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 18
programme.desc: A risky advantage is in play but will an alliance trust enough to help pull it off, or will it all end in failure?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 19
programme.desc: A boy's alliance starts to form, and someone is on a mission to take out a big player. Eight are left. Who will be going home tonight?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 20
programme.desc: For one, paranoia takes hold for the first time and wounded egos collide after an explosive Tribal Council. Everyone's hungry to make big moves and impress the Jury.

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 21
programme.desc: With only five days left, loyalties are tested and powers shift. With only six Survivors left, who will be going home tonight?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 22
programme.desc: Someone's in the firing line and another must make an impossible choice. With only a few days left of the game, who will be going home tonight?

programme.title: Australian Survivor S9 Ep. 23
programme.desc: The final four are left and tensions are on the rise as deals are exposed. An all-out war is on the cards... who will be safe from the vote tonight?

programme.desc: Married NHS workers, Will and Kathryn, are the first team to take on the never-ending money ladder.

programme.title: Limitless Win S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Zee and his dad, Tony, return to take on the Limitless money ladder.

programme.title: Limitless Win S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Sisters Sarah and Amy return to take on the Limitless Ladder.

programme.title: Limitless Win S1 Ep. 4
