programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 3
programme.desc: With less than a week to go before the marathon, Arg, Billi and Cara continue their training, with the help of Ricardo. Mario and Ricky rib Little Chris over his failed attempt at chatting up Frankie. Gemma has a clothing line launch.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 4
programme.desc: We follow the progress of Arg, Billi and Cara in the London Marathon. Bobby gets plastic surgery advice from Chloe and Lauren P. Charlie and Gemma have a heart to heart after Gemma was uncovered as Ricky’s mystery texter.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Billi, Cara and Arg recover after completing the London marathon. Chloe and the girls take her daughter to the farm for her birthday. Lucy and Mario celebrate their one year anniversary.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 6
programme.desc: It’s Mick’s birthday and he’s throwing a party Vegas Style – everyone is going. Sam, Billie, Gemma and Lucy try out Pole Dancing. Mario takes Little Chris to get his chest waxed.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Sam throws a dinner party for all of the ‘couples’. We meet Gemma’s new mystery man Rami. Tom P and Lauren P go on a date to a vineyard- will he do enough to impress her?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 8
programme.desc: There’s a new girl on the block. The girl Tom K has been texting is revealed and there are a few unhappy campers. We find out the goss after Lauren P’s and Tom P’s snog. Joey’s in trouble with Sam. Nanny Pat gets new dentures.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Joey thinks he might have made a mistake by dumping Sam, but is it too late? Lucy does a photoshoot for her new swimwear range. It’s the launch night of Bobby’s brand new hairdressing Academy. The tension simmers between Gemma and her ex Charlie.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S5 Ep. 10
programme.desc: The rivalry between the boys escalates and Diags is determined to confront Mario. Lauren comes face-to-face with Tom P questioning him over his decision to choose Lauren P over her. Gemma apologizes to Bobby for ruining his open night.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Lucy and Mario host their engagement party, but who will be invited? Joey and Sam go on a double date with Essex’s newest couple, Arg and Gemma. Little Chris makes Mario an engagement present, but will he be his best man?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Mick and Debbie host a glam Essex Sports Day including a three-legged couple race. There is a new romance on the cards for Lauren G. Jess finds herself stuck in the middle of Lucy and Mario and Sam and Joey.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Joey celebrates his Birthday with an 80’s themed party. Lauren P and Lauren G come face to face for the first time since Lauren G started seeing Tom P. Gemma gets stuck in the middle of a row between boyfriend Arg, and his former girlfriend, Lydia.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Tom P takes Lauren Goodger to the cinema, for their first date. Jess gives Ricky an ultimatum. Arg turns up on Gemma’s doorstep with a surprise, but will she like it?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Bobby confides in best friend Lydia that he thinks he's fallen in love with Charlie; Sam and Lucy agree to meet and make up over the cheating accusations against Mario.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Everyone heads out to celebrate Charlie's birthday; sensing something is wrong with Bobby, Charlie tries to comfort his best friend although Bobby drops a bombshell. Jamie Reed makes quite an impression on a few of the ladies.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Arg bumps into Jamie, but how will he react? Mario talks to Tom P about texting Jess. Sam hosts a BBQ, but who will turn up?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Jess hosts a showcase for her new single. Sam and Joey have a tennis lesson, but who will come out on top? New boy Jamie continues to ruffle feathers.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Lauren Goodger has her doubts about Tom P. Arg takes Gemma for a surprise singing lesson. Bobby celebrates his birthday with a trip to Southend and a gay night out.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S6 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Lucy throws a prom for her 21st Birthday. One of the couples gets voted prom King and Queen. Jamie apologizes to Frankie, but will it be accepted?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Gemma is sick of Arg. Charlie wants to progress things with Danni. Joey and Sam seek divine intervention.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Joey and Arg have an accident. Charlie gets a talking to. Lauren P bumps into an old friend.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Debbie makes her feelings known to Tom K. The girls get sporty. Arg and Tom fallout. Charlie has a few words with Danni and Bobby confronts Danni.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Lucy lays her cards on the table. Mario seeks some advice from his brother in law. Lydia sets the record straight. and the boys launch a full scale operation to retrieve what is rightfully Arg’s!

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Cara gives her little brother some sisterly advice. Mick is told a friend of his is hitting-on a Honey. Joey tries to find Arg a date and the Netball team is decided.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Kirk seeks some professional help. Mario bares all to win back Lucy’s affection. Arg goes on a blind date and Ricky makes a proposal.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Arg does a runner. Chloe plays her first DJ set and Mario and Tom K receive a shocking picture.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Bobby and Danni have a row. Arg plays his biggest gig yet.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Gemma holds a singles night. Joey becomes a superhero. The boys become spies and Charlie drops a bombshell.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S7 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Arg changes his image. The girls have their first netball match. Gemma gets knocked back and Bobby tries his luck in lederhosen.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 1
programme.desc: There’s double trouble, the patter of tiny feet and lots of real-life drama, plus a birthday night to remember for all the wrong reasons for Lucy & Mario

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 2
programme.desc: As the dust settles on Sunday’s explosive episode, what next for Lucy and Mario? Gemma launches her brand new diet club, Bobby’s quest to become a dad continues plus could there be the patter of tint feet for Lauren and Kirk…?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 3
programme.desc: All the latest drama from Essex as Lucy searches for the truth about Mario, Gemma’s Diet Club continues on horseback, Joey starts recruiting staff for his brand new shop, and could it be third time lucky for Kirk and Lauren…?

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 4
programme.desc: All the latest drama and gossip from the real lives of our uber glam, super tanned friends from Essex. Lucy heads off on a mystery date… Danny Walia tries his luck with a visit to a model agency.

programme.title: The Only Way Is Essex S8 Ep. 5
programme.desc: All the latest drama and gossip from the real lives of our uber glam, super tanned friends from Essex. After their twitter rant – what next for Lucy and Mario? The cast celebrate Mother’s Day Essex-style,.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 406
programme.desc: It's James' birthday and the gang plan a surprise trip to Dublin to celebrate with a secret guest, but on their return their high is brought down by Ricci's return with some bad news.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 407
programme.desc: With Ricci gone from the Geordie Shore house, the rest of the gang are determined to keep Vicky's spirits up and the boys decide that what better way than a walk on the wild side - camping!

programme.title: Geordie Shore S4 Ep. 408
programme.desc: It's all coming to an end in the house with some keener to leave than others. Before they pack their bags, there's time for a big bash, Geordie style, and it seems like love is all around.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 501
programme.desc: The Geordie Shore gang are back in a pimped up pad and ready to cause chaos once again. (S5, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 502
programme.desc: The gang return from Amsterdam and it's time to tear Newcastle a new one. Vicky and Ricci celebrate breaking the Geordie Shore relationship curse and the gang try out speed dating. (S5, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 503
programme.desc: There's tension in the Toon, as James brings girlfriend Kate on a night out, leaving Holly unimpressed. The Geordie Shore house explodes as Vicky and Ricci have a row to remember. (S5, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 504
programme.desc: The Geordie Tour of Europe is back on as the gang are off to Prague for banter, birds, & booze. The girls get their guns out at the shooting range whilst the boys visit the local strip clubs (S5, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 505
programme.desc: The gang return from Prague to a turbulent Toon. The house is in total meltdown as Charlotte and Gary finally come to blows, and it looks like it could be the end for Vicky and Ricci (S5, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 506
programme.desc: Charlotte returns to the Geordie Shore house just in time to join the rest of the gang on a Geordie Tour of Barcelona. Our favourite Geordies bathe in the Spanish sun, sea, sex and sangria.

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 507
programme.desc: The gang return from Barcelona with Charlotte's declaration of love for Gary still hanging in the air and Vicky set for a final showdown with Ricci (S5, ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S5 Ep. 508
programme.desc: With the gang cooling off after the biggest fight in the show's history, there's an icy atmosphere between the boys and the girls as they're off to the Alps for their final Geordie Tour (S5, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 601
programme.desc: Holly and James still haven't put their differences behind them and are a war zone waiting to happen, Gary and Scott are on a mission to pull every girl in Sydney. (S6, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 602
programme.desc: The group are in high spirits as they get a surprise visit from Jay. Charlotte is still coming to terms with her feelings for Gaz. James' battle with Holly is set to continue. (S6, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 603
programme.desc: James and Gaz come to blows over pulling and Gaz is forced to leave the house. Vicky tashes on and Holly gets up close and personal with the one and only Scotty T. (S6, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 604
programme.desc: Whilst the fittest guy in Australia sends the girls into a spin, Scotty and Gaz square up as nightclubbing gets nasty. House destruction sees Gary head into the bush. (S6, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 605
programme.desc: An anger management session is arranged for the group, and Charlotte lets out all her negative feelings towards Gaz. Sophie and Joel gets too drunk and embarrass the group on a night out. (S6, ep5)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 606
programme.desc: With Charlotte returning from the Bush a new woman, the housemates lay down the law for Scotty, slapping him with a drinking ban hoping that he will stop smashing up the house. (S6, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 607
programme.desc: James and Gary come to blows which sends shockwaves through the house and Charlotte's heart strings are pulled for Gary as she offers him support. (S6 ep7)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S6 Ep. 608
programme.desc: As their time in Sydney comes to an end, the singles make it their mission to have a storming night in the Whitsundays. The coupled housemates have raised suspicions. Last in the series. (S6, ep8)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 701
programme.desc: The Geordies are back where they belong, in Newcastle, for a jaw-dropping summer season of partying, pulling, bucking, necking on and getting mortal. (S7, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 702
programme.desc: The Geordies are reeling from an explosive fallout following new girl Marnie's arrival. A night out ends with Scott completely losing his cool and trying to smash the house up. (S7, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 703
programme.desc: It is Holly's birthday, the Geordies celebrate as only they know how - with a mint house party. Meanwhile there's a tiny tragedy in the house, leading to an unexpected funeral on the beach. (S7, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 704
programme.desc: The house is rocked to the core as Charlotte and Holly have an explosive falling out with new girl Marnie. Scott and Gary's friendship is pushed to the limit. A former housemate returns. (S7, ep4)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S7 Ep. 706
programme.desc: Gary and Holly are still furious at the way Charlotte's boyfriend treated her. Marnie decides she'll put out if Scott behaves himself. (S7, ep6)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 801
programme.desc: The Geordies are back in the Toon for more partying, necking on and getting mortal. Everyone's buzzin' as a new lad arrives to join the crew and Marnie promises to stay away from the boys. (S8, ep1)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 802
programme.desc: Gary gets jealous when Marnie flirts with new boy Aaron. Vicky returns to the house, and there's the first ever Tash-On Tours as the Geordies put their own spin on singles nights. (S8, ep2)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 803
programme.desc: Charlotte's back! And her arrival couldn't have come at a worse time. New lad Aaron wins a date with Holly after her challenge, but he reveals he's actually got a thing for Vicky. (S8, ep3)

programme.title: Geordie Shore S8 Ep. 804
programme.desc: With Charlotte back in the house, all eyes are on Gary and Marnie and whether they'll decide to continue sleeping together. (S8, ep4)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 208
programme.desc: When news gets out that Angelina and Vinny hooked up, Mike threatens to spill the beans to Jose. Vinny and Pauly find the girls of their dreams, but one of them will be heartbroken. (S2, ep8)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 209
programme.desc: Things go south for Angelina when the house learns that she slept with Jose after smushing Vinnie, but trouble really ensues when she gets too close to a guy Snooki hooked up with. (S2, ep9)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 210
programme.desc: Mike reunites with his Canadian hottie, providing entertainment for the whole house. But when Angelina tells her roommates how she really feels, she pushes Snooki into a frenzy. (S2, ep10)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 211
programme.desc: With Angelina gone, Snooki thinks it's time that she and Jenni bury the hatchet with Sam but Snooki's happiness is short-lived as Mark becomes increasingly belligerent with her. (S2, ep11)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 212
programme.desc: Everyone is frustrated with Mike's poor game after he gets them kicked out of a club, gets the car towed, nearly burns down the house and fails as a wingman for Pauly D - twice! (S2, ep12)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 213
programme.desc: Pauly D and Vinnie have final dates with their Miami girls, and Sam and Ronnie can't stop fighting. Meanwhile, Jenni stirs things up between the boys, leading to a dramatic final night. (S2, ep13)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S2 Ep. 214
programme.desc: The cast is back together to dish the dirt on Miami - from bromances and romances, to the infamous note and the fights that followed! (S2, ep14)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 301
programme.desc: Leftover tension from Miami spills over to Seaside when unresolved issues among the girls explode on the first night. And new roommate Deena gets naked in front of The Situation! Series 3, Episode 1.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 302
programme.desc: The first night's fight causes tension in the house. Ronnie & Sammi keep isolating themselves, but things really explode when Ronnie decides to chill with the other housemates. Series 3, Episode 2.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 303
programme.desc: Sammi decides to make peace with Snooki and Deena. JWOWW runs into her old flame Roger and sparks fly. Meanwhile, Snooki gets arrested for public intoxication. Series 3, Episode 3.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 304
programme.desc: After Snooki is arrested, she becomes depressed... until she meets a new guy. Denna meets Ronnie's stunt double. Meanwhile, JWOWW's relationship with Tom comes to a dramatic end. Series 3, Episode 4.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 305
programme.desc: Ronnie and JWOWW make up, leading to Sammi punching Ronnie in the face. Vinny picks up a girl with an overbearing family, and The Situation learns Deena's dirty little secret. Series 3, Episode 5.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 306
programme.desc: Ronnie's over-drinking causes some painful side effects, Snooki meets a guy who may or may not be engaged, and Pauly D makes peace with an old nemesis. Series 3, Episode 6.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 307
programme.desc: Ronnie and Sammi's tumultuous relationship finally comes to an end, but when Ronnie destroys everything Sammi owns, she must decide whether or not to leave the Shore. Series 3, Episode 7.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 308
programme.desc: Ronnie feels like he has no friends left at the Shore after Sammi leaves & the housemates aren't sympathetic to him. Meanwhile, Mike tries to hook up with Pauly's ex-girlfriend! Series 3, Episode 8.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 309
programme.desc: Snooki's summer of hookups comes back to haunt her, and Mike pulls a big prank on Deena & Snooki... but the rest of the guys have the last laugh, leaving for dinner without him. Series 3, Episode 9.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 310
programme.desc: Sammi returns to the house & Ronnie is speechless. Snooki's feelings for Vinny continue to grow. Mike hooks up with a girl who he says smells like cheese, but is it just a prank? Series 3, Episode 10.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 311
programme.desc: Vinny & Pauly take a road trip to Staten Island, Jenni fears Roger's more than a rebound, & Mike reveals Sammi's shady ways, making Ronnie question his love. Series 3, Episode 11.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 312
programme.desc: Mike keeps instigating drama between Ron and Sammi, Snooki falls out with Vinny. Deena gets upset at Pauly and Vin for trying to hook up with her friend at the end-of-summer party.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 313
programme.desc: While one couple reaches a crossroads in their relationship, another couple makes it official. The roommates say goodbye to another summer at the Jersey Shore. Series 3, Episode 13.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S3 Ep. 314
programme.desc: Snooki and Vinny define their relationship; JWOWW tells us how she really feels about Roger; Deena clears up some rumours and Sammi and Ronnie talk about why they just couldn't make it work.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 400
programme.desc: An entertaining look back at the first three seasons of Jersey Shore - complete with all the comedy, drama, mischievous antics, and water cooler moments that keep people talking.

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 401
programme.desc: The housemates pack up their hair extensions & Shore Store t-shirts & jet off for an Italian adventure. But the culture-shock that awaits is nothing compared to their shocking new hook-ups. (S4, ep1)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 402
programme.desc: Deena & Pauly consider the consequences should they hook up. The Situation tries to take his friendship with Snooki to the next level. Ron & Sammi try to be friends but old habits die hard. (S4, ep2)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 403
programme.desc: With twins in the mix, it's double trouble as bi-curious Deena pulls the robbery on both The Situation and Vinny. Plus, The Situation's 'secret hook-up' with Snooki is revealed. (S4, ep3)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 404
programme.desc: The boys harass Deena for stealing a girl from Vinny's bed. Ronnie & Sammi are back to their old ways, but this time The Situation is involved in their drama. (S4, ep4)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 405
programme.desc: After causing drama between Ronnie & Sammi for years, The Situation comes to blows with Ronnie. But with The Situation carried out on a stretcher, have things finally gone too far? (S4, ep5)

programme.title: Jersey Shore S4 Ep. 406
programme.desc: Pauly D and Vinny put on a Guido-themed comedy show, while Ron and Sammi try to patch things up. Snooki is so distraught over her long-distance relationship that JWOWW and Sammi decide to intervene.

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 108
programme.desc: Charlotte attends the premiere for The Charlotte Show and hosts a party to celebrate. But when Josh sees a clip of her with another boy in Australia it brings back bad memories. (S1, ep8)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S1 Ep. 109
programme.desc: Charlotte gets together with her mum, dad and Melissa to watch unseen footage from the series, including hilarious out-takes, funny moments and revealing chats. Plus Charlotte has a surprise for Mel.

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 201
programme.desc: Charlotte Crosby's real-life reality show is back! Charlotte and Josh are in a great place, but they have a huge row on the day of his sister's baby shower. Charlotte arranges a night out. (S2, ep1)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 202
programme.desc: Charlotte and Mel come face to face to try and resolve their differences. Josh invites Charlotte to Bolton for a big family dinner and Charlotte surprises her Mam by taking her on a trip. (S2, ep2)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 203
programme.desc: Charlotte and her Mam head off to Iceland on a mission to save the whales. Josh decides to go on a big night out which leads to a huge row. Charlotte is left questioning their relationship. (S2, ep3)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 204
programme.desc: Charlotte must devise a plan to save her and Josh from splitting. Charlotte travels to Manchester for Adam and Jamie's engagement party, but a sick night ends in a media storm. (S2, ep4)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 205
programme.desc: With their new schedule and a plan for their parents to meet, Josh and Charlotte are better than ever. But things take a turn for the worse when Charlotte attempts to surprise Josh. (S2, ep5)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 206
programme.desc: Josh's parents are staying over but will The Crosbys and The Ritchies get on? Charlotte suspects paranormal activity and turns to a medium and his dog. Mel's birthday ends in disaster. (S2, ep6)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 207
programme.desc: Will Charlotte and Mel resolve things in time for their trip to South Africa? Josh proves himself to be the ultimate hero when he rushes to Charlotte's aid after a terrifying accident. (S2, ep7)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S2 Ep. 208
programme.desc: Charlotte plans a surprise to take her and Josh to a whole new level of love, but how will Josh react? Josh attempts to overcome his biggest fear to prove his love to Charlotte. (S2, ep8)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 301
programme.desc: Charlotte Crosby's real-life reality show is back! Charlotte tries to put a plan in place for having babies with Josh, but Josh thinks she's moving too fast and things go downhill. (S3, ep1)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 302
programme.desc: After a huge fallout about when to have a baby, can Charlotte and Josh save their relationship? Banana goes to the vets, and Lauren has an emotional surprise for Charlotte. (S3, ep2)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 303
programme.desc: Charlotte has an embarrassing accident which results in a trip to the mattress shop. Charlotte must tell her mam and Lauren some big news about her and Josh, but how will they react? (S3, ep3)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 304
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh invite their parents for a weekend away, but will their families still get on after a weekend together in the Lake District? (S3, ep4)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 305
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh discover they will be travelling abroad for work, but an argument over a smoothie threatens to ruin the trip. Charlotte sees a consultant about her breast pain. (S3, ep5)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 306
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh head off to Brazil. But their romantic getaway turns sour after a series of arguments leaves Charlotte questioning the future of their relationship. (S3, ep6)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 307
programme.desc: Charlotte and Josh's trip to Brazil ends in style with a helicopter date. When back in the UK, Charlotte heads straight into surgery for an operation to remove her breast implants. (S3, ep7)

programme.title: The Charlotte Show S3 Ep. 308
programme.desc: Charlotte comes out of surgery after having her breast implants removed, but it looks like recovery will be slow and painful. It's Charlotte's birthday and she and Josh have a joint party. (S3, ep8)

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: As Lauren Conrad juggles fashion school, a demanding internship and an unpredictable roommate who sabotages her work event, she learns quickly that everything is bigger in Los Angeles, including her problems.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Lauren deals with the fallout of Heidi crashing the Teen Vogue party. When Heidi lands an interview for a 'dream job' that leads her to consider ditching school, permanently, Lauren realizes that she and Heidi may be on different paths.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Teen Vogue sends Lauren on an overnight errand that lands her in New York City and returns to LA only to find a major surprise from her past waiting for her.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: When an ex-boyfriend reappears in Lauren's life, she is surprised to see she might not be as over him as she thought. Meanwhile at her new job, Heidi asks if the price of paying her dues is worth the cost.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Lauren races home from an all-day Teen Vogue event to be with Jason on his birthday, but the night doesn't turn out as she expected. Audrina seeks Heidi's advice for her latest date with model/actor, Danny.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Jason becomes a mounting distraction in Lauren's professional and academic life. Heidi finally gets her big chance to work in the nightclubs, but it couldn't have come at a worse time.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: It's the gang's first Holiday in LA and not everyone gets what they wish for. A New Year's kiss proves hard to come by for Lauren when Jason finds out she got an unexpected call from an old flame.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Jason wants to make Lauren's 20th birthday special but when she lies to him about working with male models for a Teen Vogue assignment their relationship is put to the test.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Heidi finally decides she's had enough drama with Jordan. When she turns to the girls for advice, she realizes what she has to do to. With their fighting days behind them, Lauren and Jason think about taking things to the next level.

programme.title: The Hills S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: When Lauren's hard work at LA Fashion Week leads to a career opportunity of a lifetime, she is torn between her job and her boyfriend. Whitney says goodbye to LA for the summer, and Heidi and Audrina look forward to being single in the city.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: After a rocky summer with her boyfriend Jason, Lauren decides to break it off and returns to Teen Vogue to face her unhappy boss. Heidi finds herself in trouble with a guy both she and Audrina are dating.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Lauren goes on her first date since Jason and is tested at work when she's asked to work a fashion show. Heidi has a life changing secret she must tell her boyfriend.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: When an uninvited Audrina shows up at Heidi's birthday, she learns Heidi's not ready to forgive and forget. Lauren, determined to focus on work, falls for the charms of the new guy in her life, Brody.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Audrina tells Heidi about Spencer's cheating ways, but Heidi is doubtful - until she sees it for herself. Lauren continues to wonder whether she is ready for a relationship.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Heidi takes a break Spencer but finds herself missing him more than she'd like. Lauren has to plan a Teen Vogue dinner but takes a backseat to super-intern Emily from New York.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: When Lauren tells Heidi what she really thinks about Spencer, Heidi must choose between her best friend and her boyfriend.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Lauren realizes she can't trust her best friends after Heidi hooks Jen up with Brody.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Audrina takes Lauren out on blind double date, while Lauren and Heidi grow farther apart.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Spencer asks Heidi to move in with him but Heidi doesn't know what to do or how to tell her roommate, Lauren.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Lauren's 21st birthday is full of surprises when Heidi and Audrina throw her a party.

programme.title: The Hills S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: With a new job on the line, Whitney stumbles in her biggest opportunity with Teen Vogue.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Dave Rife, White Castle owner and grandson of the founder, goes undercover in the family business.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 5
programme.desc: COO of Churchill Downs, Bill Carstanjan, faces his fear of horses head-on to go undercover in his own company.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Michael Rubin, one of America's youngest CEOs, goes undercover in the billion-dollar e-commerce company that he founded.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Joel Manby, a boss who recently turned his life around, goes undercover in his nationwide theme park and amusement company.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: President and COO Rick Arquilla goes undercover in the largest plumbing and drain cleaning company in North America.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S1 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Chris McCann, President and COO of America's largest florist and online gift shops, goes undercover.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Steve Joyce hits the frontlines of his own company, which includes such popular hotel franchises as Comfort Inn, Econo Lodge, Quality and Cambria Suites, and receives an exhausting, up-close look at the industry.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Kim Schaefer, CEO of Great Wolf Resorts, North America's largest family of indoor waterpark resorts, struggles to keep pace working in an aquatic center and gets her hands dirty when she responds to a call no waterpark employee wants to receive.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 3
programme.desc: Mike White, Chairman, President and CEO of DIRECTV, the world's most popular video service goes undercover in his own company where he discovers that employees are spending their own money for a specific piece of equipment.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Bryan Bedford, Chairman of the Board, President and CEO of Frontier Airlines, goes undercover in his own company, where he "gets christened" while emptying a plane's lavatory and discovers how company-wide pay cuts are impacting his employees.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Steve Phelps, SVP and Chief Marketing Officer for NASCAR, the #1 spectator sport in the U.S., goes undercover with one of the sport's pit crews and also struggles to keep pace working alongside a grounds crew preparing for the "Daytona 500."

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Fernando Aguirre, Chairman and CEO of Chiquita, one of the largest producers of fruits and vegetables in the world, is unable to perform a physically demanding job at their flagship factory and has to be removed from the line.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Todd Ricketts, one of the owners of the Chicago Cubs, goes undercover within one of baseball's most famous franchises and fights for the chance to redeem himself after being let go on the second day.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Steven Foster, Co-Founder and CEO of Lucky Strike Lanes, one of the nation's largest chains of upscale bowling alleys, takes an emotional trip inside his own company where among other things, he hits the streets as a walking bowling pin.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 9
programme.desc: Don Fertman, the Chief Development Officer for SUBWAY restaurants, one of the world's largest food franchises, goes undercover where he learns endless sandwich combinations while being trained by one of the toughest, no-nonsense employees ever.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 10
programme.desc: Henrik Slipsager, President and CEO of ABM Industries, one of the nation's largest facilities services contractors, offering janitorial, engineering, parking and security services for thousands of clients, takes a journey within his own corporation.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 11
programme.desc: John Fuller, President and CEO of Johnny Rockets, one of the nation's largest chains of retro-themed restaurants, goes undercover to work in a restaurant for the first time in his career.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Kevin Sheehan, President and CEO of Norwegian Cruise Line, finds himself in uncharted territory when he's asked to lead nearly 1,000 party-goers in a line dance, and is later forced to reveal his true identity after being recognized by an employee.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Ronald Croatti, President and CEO of UniFirst, one of the nation's largest producers of workwear and uniforms, dons a "hippie" look during his undercover mission, where he finds himself struggling to keep pace with the fast-moving assembly line.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Sheldon Yellen, the CEO of BELFOR, the world's largest disaster restoration company, goes undercover and becomes frustrated while struggling to hang drywall. Also, the boss unexpectedly reveals himself while working alongside an employee.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Denny Slagle, President and CEO of Mack Trucks, the second largest manufacturer of heavy-duty trucks in the world, goes undercover and brings the plant's assembly line to a halt, and hears rumors that Mack is moving its operations to Mexico.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: The mayor of Cincinnati, Mark Mallory, becomes the first elected official to go undercover as a municipal employee, working as a mechanic repairing public transportation vehicles and a sanitation worker.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 17
programme.desc: Rich McClure, CEO of United Van Lines, the nation's largest moving company, asks his wife to assist him during one of his undercover jobs. And the boss' moving team fears he won't make it through the physically demanding process of an entire move.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Scott Sibella, President and COO of the MGM Grand in Las Vegas, goes undercover within the walls of the second-largest hotel in the world and faces a group of rowdy gamblers who are quick to point out his shortcomings as a dealer.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 19
programme.desc: Bill Massa, President and CEO of Synagro, the nation's largest waste water treatment corporation, goes undercover in the series' dirtiest mission to date and finds himself cleaning a tank of 27-year-old sludge.

programme.title: Undercover Boss S2 Ep. 20
programme.desc: David Kim, CEO of Baja Fresh, one of the nation's largest restaurant chains, takes matters into his own hands when he encounters a problem at one of his stores. And after his emotional undercover mission, delivers some shocking news to his boardroom.

programme.desc: A widowed mother of two goes to work for her lover Frank Russo, a Captain in a Brooklyn crime family.

programme.title: Denial
programme.desc: A historian must battle to prove the Holocaust actually occurred when a renowned denier sues her for libel.

programme.title: The Pilot's Wife
programme.desc: A recently widowed woman struggles to learn if her husband intentionally crashed the plane he was piloting.

programme.title: Last Chance Harvey
programme.desc: A struggling jingle writer and a lonely bureaucrat meet by chance in London and transform each others' lives.

programme.title: 20th Century Women
programme.desc: In 1979 Santa Barbara, a single mother enlists two women to help with her son's upbringing.

programme.title: A Million Little Pieces
programme.desc: James Frey uncovers a community of recovering addicts that support him on his journey to redemption.

programme.title: Thank You for Your Service
programme.desc: A look at how Post Traumatic Stress Disorder affects American servicemen and women returning home from war.

programme.title: Factory Girl
programme.desc: A wanna-be star meets and falls for Andy Warhol, and he promises her the fame she's always dreamed of.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 710
programme.desc: Little Map: Map has been teaching his nephew, Little Map, how to draw pictures that help us on our adventures. And he's getting really good, so today he's ready for his very first treasure adventure!

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 110
programme.desc: Olivia is sleeping over at her Grandpa's house, but she forgot to bring her favourite bedtime story with her. Milli, Geo and Bot know a place where you can get any book you need!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Gabby is the mechanic all the Monster Machines in town count on to fix them up. But when Crusher steals all her tools, Gabby needs Blaze's help to get them back!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: As the girls search for Leah's lost necklace, an underground creature finds it and begins making wishes with it. / After Zac wishes to stay in Zahramay Falls forever, the kids search for a powerful genie to reverse the wish.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Leah, Shimmer, and Shine meet a mermaid and explore her underwater world. Shimmer, Shine, and Leah explore an ice palace in their search for a magical gem.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 18
programme.desc: When Leah wishes for more doll friends for her genies to play with in her new dollhouse, she didn't mean for the genies to shrink themselves down to doll-size! Another wish causes Leah to shrink by mistake too

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 115
programme.desc: Milli, Geo, and Bot are packing healthy snacks for a picnic with their friend, Anna. But just then the Umi Alarm sounds - it's Anna! Her lunchbox and flask are missing!

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 207
programme.desc: The Ghost Family Fancy Dress Party: It's Halloween in Umi City, and everyone's dressing up in great costumes - even a friendly little ghost! Milli, Geo and Bot have never met a ghost before.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Blaze and AJ are deep in the woods when they discover and befriend a mud-loving monster truck named Gasquatch. Now, they must set out on an epic adventure to bring their new friend to Mud Fest… the muddiest party of all time.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 4
programme.desc: In the kingdom of knight-trucks, Blaze discovers a machine his medieval pals use to recharge. But when a dragon snatches the charging station, Blaze leads a quest to recover the machine before everyone in the kingdom runs out of energy and falls asleep.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Zeta uses a Zahracorn suit to sneak her, Nazboo, and his family into the Zahracorn Parade, but the disguise goes haywire! Zeta grows jealous when Nazboo gets an enchanted robe that allows him to do magic.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 13
programme.desc: A stinky bug infestation in Zeta's secret lair forces her to spend the night at Shimmer and Shine's Palace. Zeta and Nazboo have to take care of Shimmer, Shine, and Leah when a potion mishap turns them into little babies.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 19
programme.desc: When Kaz worries he's not brave enough, he adventures with the kids to find a Bravery Gem to help him. / Nazboo finds a kazoo that makes magic stronger when you play it, including Zeta's.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 106
programme.desc: The Wild West Toy Train Show: Milli, Geo, and Bot can't wait to meet their friend Ethan, but a gust of wind has blown Ethan's ticket out of his hands all the way up to the top of Wild West Mountain!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Nazboo goes off to help a genie with his deliveries, but Zeta worries she's lost him and enlists the girls' help to find him. When the girls learn to cloud surf, Shine gets overexcited and tries to ride the biggest wave at Cloud Beach.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 801
programme.desc: Dora's Super Soccer Showdown: Dora travels to Brazil to play in the Big Cup Soccer Tournament, and if her team can beat the Monsters, they'll win the big cup.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 214
programme.desc: Chicks in the City: The school has been taking care of six eggs and now they're hatching! Milli, Geo and Bot watch as six adorable baby chicks pop out of their eggs. But then it gets windy! Eek!

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 112
programme.desc: It's snack time and Samantha's baby brother Tyler really wants his favourite - fruit and yogurt - but they're all out! So Milli, Geo, and Bot zoom to the supermarket.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S4 Ep. 22
programme.desc: The girls help the Zeashell Genie make surprisefilled zeashells, but sneaky Uzma swaps the surprises inside with her own. The girls run into trouble when Zeta enlists a cute magic-sucking fish to suck up their wish magic.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 9
programme.desc: It’s Darington’s birthday! Crusher uses a robot plate to try and steal the birthday cake, but his plan goes awry and the cake goes rocketing away. Will Blaze catch the runaway cake before Crusher and save the party?

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 101
programme.desc: The Big Red Chicken: The Big Red Chicken: Dora and Boots read about a chicken that's as big as a house and set off on an educational adventure to meet him.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Dora and Boots journey deep into the Never-to-be-Seen-Again Forest so they can bring magic water back from Sparkling Lake and save the magic in Fairytale Land.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S2 Ep. 16
programme.desc: Little ice sprites use Shimmer and Shine's palace for their games, turning it into a winter wonderland Samira offers Zeta the chance to be a genie again under one condition: she must grant Shimmer and Shine's wishes.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 619
programme.desc: Dora's Knighthood Adventure!: Dora and Boots are reading stories about knights with their friends Rocinante the horse and Dapple the donkey when suddenly they hear a cry for help.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 8
programme.desc: Dora and her cousin Diego are on their way to a big surprise. It's Boots and Baby Jaguar's Amazing Animal Circus!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S1 Ep. 6
programme.desc: When Leah's party food accidentally gets run over by Zac, Leah needs to figure out what else to bring fast. Leah asks her genies for more Pigs in a Blanket, but the genies give her real pigs wrapped in a blanket!

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S2 Ep. 203
programme.desc: The Umizoomi Zoo!: A cute and cuddly Purple Monkey is moving into The Umi City Zoo today. But when he falls into the Penguin exhibit, it's Team Umizoomi to the rescue!

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 13
programme.desc: Surprise: It's Boots' birthday! Dora tells him that all his friends are waiting at her house to give Boots a big party.

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 2
programme.desc: When Leah wishes to be a genie for the day, Zeta uses magic to have Leah grant her wishes. / When Zac thinks the girls are missing, he plays detective and goes on the search with Kaz.

programme.title: Team Umizoomi S1 Ep. 118
programme.desc: There's only one thing that scares dinosaurs - the sound of thunder! So when a big storm frightens them away, Team Umizoomi must find the missing dinosaurs and lead them back home.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 999
programme.desc: Dora's Pirate Adventure: Yo ho ho! Dora and Boots and all their friends are putting on a pirate show today for their mommies and daddies.

programme.desc: The girls travel with Shaya to an island where they meet the Animal Genie, who looks after all animals. / Shimmer and Shine tell Leah the story of how they met Tala and Nahal, with help from the Animal Genie.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S6 Ep. 612
programme.desc: Dora's helping her new friend, Pepe the Pig, learn all about his new school. Pepe's really excited, especially when he hears that if the class earns 3 gold stars today, they get a popcorn party!

programme.title: Shimmer and Shine S3 Ep. 6
programme.desc: When the magical rainbow water goes out of balance, Samira sends the girls through the waterfall to a new world – Rainbow Zahramay. There, they meet a Waterfall Genie who can help them bring balance to the water.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Sticky Tape: Benny the Bull needs some Sticky Tape in a hurry. His hot air balloon is leaking, and floating toward Crocodile Lake! Dora and Boots rush off to rescue their friend.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 995
programme.desc: Dora Saves The Mermaids: It's Clean-Up the Beach Day, as Dora and Boots are cleaning up garbage when they find a Singing Clam, who tells them the story of Mariana the Mermaid. Mariana lives in the Mermaid Kingdom at the bottom of the ocean.

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 8

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 12
programme.desc: Dora in Wonderland: While Dora's kitties run through a magic mirror, Dora becomes Dora in Wonderland! Join her and Boots on a double-length adventure through the magical, mixed-up world of Wonderland!

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S1 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Blaze and his driver AJ are introduced to a world of racing Monster Machines! When a truck named Crusher uses dirty tricks to try and win the Championship Race, Blaze will do everything he can to help his friends beat Crusher! Part 1.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 15
programme.desc: Everyone's getting ready for the big Thanksgiving Day parade and dinner, but the Pirate Piggies accidentally float away on Dora's boat float.

programme.desc: When Blaze smells smoke at Axle City’s garage, he calmly and courageously leads his friends outside to safety. Axle City’s fire chief is impressed with Blaze’s courage and thinks maybe he has what it takes to be a fire fighter, too.

programme.desc: Leah, Shimmer, and Shine attend a party at Samira's palace. Zeta crashes the party pretending to be Samira. Zeta uses a potion to swap Leah's voice with a bird's. Will Shimmer and Shine understand Leah's tweets?

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S1 Ep. 2

programme.title: Blaze and the Monster Machines S3 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Blaze and Stripes transform into ferociously fast jungle cats to race in the Animal Island Championship! But to win, they’ll have to beat Crusher disguised as a cheating cheetah. Can they claw their way to victory?

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S8 Ep. 1
programme.desc: With her brave dog at her side, Dora races on her scooter to the Big River so they can rescue Boots.

programme.title: Dora The Explorer S7 Ep. 14
programme.desc: Map has been teaching his nephew, Little Map, how to draw pictures that help us on our adventures, and today he's ready for his first treasure adventure! We help Little Map draw pictures and play map games to find the treasure at Treasure Mountain!

programme.desc: Crusher and Pickle challenge Blaze and his friends to a sailboat race. But when he tries to cheat, Crusher accidentally crashes both ships onto a tropical island!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 49
programme.desc: Krab Borg!/Rock A Bi-Valve: After watching a movie where robots take over the world, Spongebob thinks Mr. Krabs is a robot. Spongebob and Patrick find a baby clam and decide to raise it as their own

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 51
programme.desc: Spongebob decides to throw a big party after discovering a "how to throw a party" kit in the grocery store.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 53
programme.desc: Patrick joins Ms. Puff's class but begins to get Spongebob in a lot of trouble causing him to lose gold stars./Mr. Krabs takes Spongebob and Squidward on a clam fishing trip.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 54

programme.desc: Mr. Krabs gets ill after eating an old Krabby Patty that he refused to throw away./SpongeBob has an accident while sand sledding! Afraid for his safety, he won't leave his house.

programme.desc: Mr. Krabs aims to squeeze every penny out of kids on summer break by building a playground in the Krusty Krab./SpongeBob and Patrick lure Squidward to their backyard campout.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 58
programme.desc: Spongebob desperately searches for his missing name tag./Plankton enlists his relatives to help him steal the Krabby Patty Secret Formula.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S3 Ep. 59
programme.desc: SpongeBob is jellyfishing when he wistfully realizes that he wants to fly./Patchy the Pirate is set to present a never before seen episode of Spongebob with one problem - no tape.

programme.desc: SpongeBob catches someone littering and turns him in - but it's the Tattletale Strangler!/SpongeBob and Patrick invest in some magic "invisible spray" at the local prank shop.

programme.desc: With the Krusty Krab's new "open 24 hours" policy, the employees must work 'round the clock./Mr. Krabs loses his shell right before a big reunion with his old buddies.

programme.desc: While trying to beat a world record, SpongeBob forgets to feed Gary - for several weeks. So Gary runs away to downtown Bikini Bottom where he is taken in by a kind old woman.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 64
programme.desc: Squidward's lazy Sunday is constantly interrupted by Spongebob and Patrick's Good Neighbor Club activities./Squidward becomes obsessed with winning a prize from the Skill Crane.

programme.desc: After a freak jousting accident at a Medieval Times restaurant, SpongeBob and Patrick are transported to a medieval version of Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 67
programme.desc: SpongeBob sets out to make his own Mermaid Man movie using the original actors, fresh from the retirement home./Mr. Krabs is horrified to learn Plankton is dating his mother!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 68
programme.desc: Patrick gets hit in the head and comes to with superior intellect!/Sandy accidentally melds Spongebob and Squidward into one body when her teleportation device malfunctions.

programme.desc: In another one of his money-making schemes, Mr. Krabs turns the Krusty Krab into an upscale hotel./Mrs. Puff gets fired when the higher-ups learn of Spongebob's repeated failure.

programme.desc: The Flying Dutchman crashes at SpongeBob's house where he constantly scares, startles, and surprises SpongeBob./Sandy is worried her inventions won't satisfy her chimp beneficiaries.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 71
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs tries to throw his daughter, Pearl, the best birthday ever./Spongebob competes on Karate Island for the title "King of Karate."

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 72
programme.desc: Spongebob's spatula breaks mid-patty flip to be replaced by Le Spatula./Mr. Krabs sends Spongebob down a wishing well to collect the coins dropped in by people making wishes.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 74
programme.desc: Spongebob has never had a vacation. To save his job, Mr.Krabs gives him the day off! /Spongebob finds an old powdered wig in the trash and wears it thinking it's cool.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 75
programme.desc: When Squidward swallows his clarinet reed Sandy offers to retrieve the piece./A misunderstanding over an advertisement causes Patrick to think he must get out of town.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 76
programme.desc: After a bike accident, Squidward is coated in so much mud that the residents of Bikini Bottom think he is a monster./ SpongeBob tries to impress Squidward with his new magic kit.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 77
programme.desc: SpongeBob has failed his driving test - again. Pat is so outraged that he takes the test to prove that it is unfair, only he passes!/ Patrick discovers in a genealogy document that he is next in line to receive a kingly title!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 78
programme.desc: SpongeBob hears that a ferocious biker gang is coming to town, so SpongeBob prepares to protect the town all by himself./A new Kelp Smoothy chain is opening up all over Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 79
programme.desc: SpongeBob's favorite jellyfishing net is missing! And worst of all, Pat may have been the one that stole it./Rejected yet again by Squidward, SpongeBob decides that if he can't hang with the real Squid, he'll make his own.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S4 Ep. 80

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 81
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs and Plankton have been business rivals and bitter enemies for longer than anyone can remember. But one day, Mr. Krabs reveals that they were not always this way. There was a time when the two rivals were best friends.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 82
programme.desc: Mr. Krab's old fry cook pays a special visit to the Krusty Krab. SpongeBob is in awe of his predecessor, who has since become a world-renowned chef./Tales of the boogeyman send SpongeBob into a panic.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 83
programme.desc: We check on Patrick's morning routine in 'Rise and Shine', SpongeBob must be patient for his cereal-based entertainment in 'Waiting', and then in 'Fungus Among Us', SpongeBob develops a case of Ick!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 84
programme.desc: Mr Krabs is determined to uncover Plankton's next devious plot in 'Spy Buddies', we learn advanced boating techniques in 'Boat Smarts', and Mr Krabs holds a competition in 'Good Old Whatshisname'.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 85
programme.desc: SpongeBob moves into the Krusty Krab (so that he'll never be late again) in 'New Digs', and then in 'Krabs A La Mode', Plankton has an idea to cause some chilly trouble for Mr Krabs.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 86
programme.desc: A scary roller coaster opens at Bikini Bottom's amusement park in 'Roller Cowards', then in 'Bucket Sweet Bucket', Plankton tricks SpongeBob, Patrick and Squidward into fixing up the Chum Bucket.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 87
programme.desc: SpongeBob has trouble saying goodbye to the most perfect Krabby Patty he has ever cooked up in 'To Love A Patty', and then in 'Breath of Fresh Squidward', Squidward becomes the most jovial Squid ever!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 88
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs wishes he could talk to money in 'Money Talks', and then in 'SpongeBob vs the Patty Gadget', SpongeBob battles a patty-making machine. Plus there's a dance contest in 'Slimy Dancing'.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 89
programme.desc: A food critic gives SpongeBob high praise, and Mr Krabs takes advantage in 'The Krusty Sponge'. Then in 'Sing A Song Of Patrick', SpongeBob helps Patrick get his song some airplay on the radio.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 90
programme.desc: Sandy's Tree Dome has a flea problem in 'A Flea In Her Dome'. Patrick accidentally takes SpongeBob's donut and feels guilty in 'Donut of Shame', and SpongeBob is washing dishes in 'The Krusty Plate'.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 91
programme.desc: Plankton turns everyone into babies in 'Goo Goo Gas', and then in 'Le Big Switch', SpongeBob switches places with a snooty French chef at a high-end restaurant.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 93
programme.desc: SpongeBob must stay clean for 'Picture Day' in boating school, Patrick eats for free in 'Pat No Pay', and then in 'Blackjack', SpongeBob must stand up to his nefarious cousin Blackjack.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 94
programme.desc: SpongeBob accidentally punches himself and gets a black eye in 'Blackened Sponge', while in 'Mermaid Man vs. SpongeBob', Mermaid Man and Barnacle Boy are brainwashed by Plankton!

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 95
programme.desc: SpongeBob and Patrick board a ship of prisoners going to jail in 'The Inmates Of Summer', and then in 'To Save A Squirrel', SpongeBob and Patrick stow away on one of Sandy's wilderness expeditions.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 96
programme.desc: Pest Of The West: SpongeBob discovers that he was related to the great Western hero, SpongeBuck. Hired as the sheriff of Dead Eye Gulch, he must reclaim the town from no-good Dead Eye Plankton.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 97
programme.desc: It's a battle of the restaurants in '20,000 Patties Under The Sea', and then in 'The Battle Of Bikini Bottom', Patrick and SpongeBob discover that they have very different views about cleanliness.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 98
programme.desc: WhoBob WhatPants?: SpongeBob gets a bump on the bonce and can't remember who he is. His friends back in Bikini Bottom, who once told him to get lost, soon find they're missing him.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 99
programme.desc: SpongeBob accidentally messes up Squidward's face in 'The Two Faces Of Squidward', and then in 'Spongehenge', SpongeBob's sponge brings all the jellyfish to the city.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S5 Ep. 100
programme.desc: SpongeBob's singing means no more Krabby Patties in 'Banned In Bikini Bottom'. Then in 'Stanley S. SquarePants', SpongeBob's cousin comes to visit, and quickly turns his life upside down.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 101
programme.desc: Squidward invites a TV show to visit his not exactly camera-ready home in 'House Fancy', then in 'Krabby Road', SpongeBob thinks that Plankton is trying to start a band. Which gives Plankton an idea.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants S6 Ep. 102
programme.desc: Mr Krabs can't believe that SpongeBob found a penny in 'Penny Foolish', and then in 'Nautical Novice', SpongeBob thinks of a new way to get his boating licence from Mrs. Puff.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: Tufflips hosts a spooky, strange and shoddy half-hour Halloween special.

programme.title: Breadwinners S2 Ep. 201
programme.desc: SwaySway and Buhdeuce babysit in 'Adventures in Big Baby Bun Sitting', and then in 'Crumbskull', the guys accidentally feed Ketta Dunce Bread just when her smartness is needed to save the planet.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig S1 Ep. 17
programme.desc: When the kids eat candy that makes good things taste bad forever, they set out on a quest to find an antidote. A cool bass player who lives in an underground convenience store threatens to break up Sanjay and Craig's friendship.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Jimmy Neutron AU S1 Ep. 2
programme.desc: Jimmy creates a machine that zaps his intelligence away in order to fit in, while his missing brains are needed to stop a meteor aimed at Retroville. Jimmy builds a candy selling robot salesman who won't take no for an answer.

programme.title: Breadwinners S1 Ep. 101
programme.desc: SwaySway and Buhdeuce deliver bread to the bad part of Duck Town in 'Thug Loaf', and then in 'Mine All Mine', they meet the most righteous dude in the planet - the Bread Maker!

programme.title: Breadwinners S1 Ep. 106
programme.desc: SwaySway and Buhdeuce sneak into a girls-only summer camp in 'Love Loaf', and then in 'Beach Day... of Horror', they head to the beach and nothing can ruin their day, not even a monster!

programme.title: Breadwinners S2 Ep. 203
programme.desc: SwaySway and Buhdeuce find the mean-spirited Pizzawinners have an even more mean-spirited boss in 'Wrath of the Pizza Lord', then in 'Shrunken Ducks', SwaySway and Buhdeuce must hide from Rambamboo.

programme.title: Sanjay and Craig S2 Ep. 19
programme.desc: The dudes go undercover with Tufflips to investigate a crime ring that's pirating action hero's movies. Sanjay and Craig go on a quest to find the top of a lawyer's head from a roadside billboard advertisement.

programme.title: The Adventures Of Jimmy Neutron AU S2 Ep. 10

programme.desc: While at Tech Fest, the Game Shakers enlist the Girls Who Code to help them take down an old enemy of Double G's who has returned seeking revenge.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 122
programme.desc: Trip beats a gaming legend, landing him a sponsorship deal with a big company. When the deal turns out to be a nightmare, Dub and the kids must help out.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Big Time Bonus: Gustavo gives the guys a bonus for their hard work, but they quickly begin to make bad decisions with their money.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 110
programme.desc: You Bet Your Bunny: The Game Shakers host a tournament to promote a new Sky Whale update. Double G bets Bunny, thinking Babe will beat one of her classmates. (S1, ep 10)

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 213
programme.desc: In order to finish their new dance game on time, The Game Shakers have to wear a motion capture suit and dance their way through the next 48 hours.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S2 Ep. 5
programme.desc: When the Premiere Movie Theater plays host to an actual movie premiere, Josh must act as personal assistant to the film's high maintenance child star.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 18
programme.desc: Megan's been extremely secretive and Drake and Josh investigate to find out what she's up to.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 22
programme.desc: A teen magazine runs a “Win a Date with BTR” contest, and the 4 lucky winning girls – each with their own baggage – give the guys serious dating drama.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S2 Ep. 6
programme.desc: Drake is unable to break up with his inappropriately laughing girlfriend because she is the daughter of his teacher who has threatened him with summer school.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S4 Ep. 4
programme.desc: Drake and Josh meet the "Great" Henry Doheny, one of the greatest magicians ever - who has fallen on tough times.

programme.title: Game Shakers S1 Ep. 108
programme.desc: Double G has scared Triple G every Halloween since he was a baby. This year he asks Babe and Kenzie to help, but they double-cross him by telling Trip!

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 305
programme.desc: Kenzie is torn whether to tell on Dub after she sees him tear down his own statue.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 306
programme.desc: The girls go to Utah to rescue Trip after Dub sends Trip to Captive Meadows - a center for boys with bad behavior.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S2 Ep. 7
programme.desc: Josh befriends Drake's doppelganger, a classmate named Drew, and Drake becomes jealous, fearing that Josh is trying to replace him.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 203
programme.desc: When Dub's brother shows up at Game Shakers and invites everyone except Dub to his wedding, the kids convince him to bring his brother into the fold, promising to make Dub behave himself at the event.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 206
programme.desc: After the Game Shakers are kicked out of Fooders to make room for a guest who has his photo on the wall, Babe is determined to get their own photo up using any means necessary. Game Component: "Spitty Llama" (App)

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 10
programme.desc: When Drake and Josh find out Megan have adopted a pet sheep, they want nothing to do with it.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 29
programme.desc: Big Time Rush has just dropped their second album and the guys get interviewed on an entertainment tonight-type program where they answer revealing questions about their life inside and outside of Big Time Rush.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 205
programme.desc: Babe is upset to learn that Mason Kendal is moving, so Kenzie designs her a virtual reality version of Mason. Babe loves it, but gets a little too swept up in the experience.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 313
programme.desc: Kenzie is hypnotized into being very, very hungry after the Game Shakers take her to see a hypnotist for her birthday.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 316
programme.desc: Dub recommends Kenzie see an eccentric pet plastic surgeon in order to fix her cat's loud nose holes. Meanwhile, Trip tries to get Hudson into a Boy Band.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S2 Ep. 21
programme.desc: The Palm Woods school is having it's annual Prom and Carlos, James, Logan and Kendall are all determined to win the prom king title, doing whatever it takes to win.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 8
programme.desc: The pressure is on as the guys prepare for their first band photo, which could land them into all the teen magazines.

programme.title: Big Time Rush S1 Ep. 10
programme.desc: It's been three months since the boys of Big Time Rush moved to Hollywood to record their demos. Now its now up to Griffin to decides the future of the band.

programme.title: Game Shakers S2 Ep. 219
programme.desc: In an attempt to seal a promotional partnership with Clam Jumper, the Game Shakers try to hack a billboard and live-stream their new game.

programme.title: Drake and Josh S3 Ep. 1
programme.desc: Drake and Josh compete in a contest where a new Plasma Screen TV is the grand prize but refuse to include Megan who turns out to to be their toughest competition.

programme.title: Game Shakers S3 Ep. 308
programme.desc: Babe tries to plan the perfect date when she finds out that Henry Hart is coming to New York to visit her.
